chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Inheritance of Grandfathers and Grandmothers

text: 5638 - وَ رَوَى اِبْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ خَالِدِ بْنِ جَرِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي اَلرَّبِيعِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : "كَانَ عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يُوَرِّثُ اَلْأَخَ مِنَ اَلْأَبِ مَعَ اَلْجَدِّ يُنَزِّلُهُ بِمَنْزِلَتِهِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.5638 - Ibn Mahbub narrated from Khalid ibn Jarir from Abu Al-Rabi from Abu Abdullah (as) who said: "Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) used to make the paternal brother inherit alongside the grandfather, placing him in the same position as the grandfather."
